SQLLite.SQL: SELECT CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE as "PartyRoleCode" , CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO as "CasePartyNumber" , CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE||'_'||CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO as "SubjectPartyKey" FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER IN ( SELECT JDG.CASE_NUMBER FROM JUDGMENTS JDG WHERE JDG.CASE_NUMBER = CPR.CASE_NUMBER AND JDG.AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND JDG.AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AND JDG.STATUS IS NULL OR JDG.STATUS = 'CANCELLED' OR JDG.STATUS = 'SATISFIED' )
